name: Fibber Mcgee Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Beat butter at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy. Gradually add sugars, beating at medium speed until blended. Add eggs, one at a time, beating just until yellow disappears; stir in vanilla. Set aside.
Combine flour and baking soda; stir into butter mixture, mixing well. Stir in oats and remaining ingredients, mixing well (mixture will be crumbly). Drop by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes. Let stand 1 minute; remove to wire racks to cool.
